name: vortos/vortos
description: The Vortos Clean Architecture Framework — project skeleton

post-create-project-cmd:
@php -r "echo '
\033[32mVortos project created!\033[0m

Publish Docker files:
  php bin/console vortos:docker:publish                (FrankenPHP)
  php bin/console vortos:docker:publish --runtime=phpfpm  (php-fpm + nginx)

';"
